task_yaml.task:
I saw a YouTube earbuds roundup and want to sanity-check one recommendation
before I buy.

Please use browser to look up the video by searching YouTube for `best wireless
earbuds 2025 review`, keeping the default relevance ranking and the 4K
filter on so we're checking the intended result.

Once you find that video, figure out the one is most suitable for usage during sleep
, then open the matching Amazon page and note whatever
price or availability is currently visible there.

Save a short conclusion, the Amazon link, and a couple of supporting
screenshots in `/tmp_workspace/results/` so I can review them later.

prompt:
